items.summary: Fix the registration flow in RegistrationScreen.tsx so that calling createUser on the backend succeeds without errors. Add proper error handling that surfaces a readable error message to the user if registration fails, and ensure the component correctly awaits the mutation result before attempting navigation.

Fix the post-registration navigation in App.tsx so that after a successful createUser call, the app transitions from the registration screen to the chat list screen immediately. Ensure the currentUser / profile state is updated before the navigation check runs, so the app does not loop back to registration or get stuck on a loading screen.

Audit and fix the backend createUser function in backend/main.mo to ensure it correctly handles duplicate username and principal checks, returns a clear error variant when registration fails, and persists the new user record reliably so subsequent getMyProfile calls return the newly created profile.
